title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hero MotoCorp - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Hero MotoCorp - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Hero MotoCorp is actively seeking a talented and motivated Process Engineer to join our dynamic team in Ahmedabad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Hero MotoCorp:
Hero MotoCorp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hero MotoCorp!
